content.en:
The third realm present was not stupid, and after a little calculation, they guessed that this third realm who was crazy about bidding for the wisdom of the Ka Ye Leaf was not the third realm that obtained the Ka Ye wisdom body, but it also had a certain relationship.

At the moment, they all want to watch the play.

They felt that the third realm that had been auctioned to the Jiaye Wisdom Leaf was over, and they might even be found by the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce Shungen who was behind the scenes.

In the dark place of the auction of the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce, the two fourth realms of the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce have come here and are staring at Ye ~ Tian.

"Is this guy the one who robbed the third realm of the Ka Ye wisdom body?"

"Probably not, the other party is not so stupid, but maybe he can find the existence of that person. "

"Don't move yet, if you move him now, once the clue is broken, this bait plan will fail!"

"Let's keep an eye on it, and that piece of Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf still bears the mark of our casting, and the Third Realm can't be erased anytime soon. "

While they were chatting, Ye Tian had already paid the Super Dimensional Dao Coins and taken away the Jiaye Wisdom Leaf.

But Ye Tian also knew very well that the fourth realm in the dark would definitely be staring at him, and he couldn't easily hand over the Jiaye Wisdom Leaf to other copy bodies, and once he came into contact with other copy bodies, other copy bodies would also be targeted.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian left with the wisdom leaf of Jiaye.

He guessed that the Fourth Realm of the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce would definitely not directly do it to him, and if it did to him, it would not let him take the Jiaye Wisdom Leaf.

Besides, for the sake of fame, at least let him walk out of the auction hall and attack him in secret.

Swish!

Ye Tian quickly walked out of the auction hall, and many third realms also came out, they didn't come to snatch the inheritance of the wisdom body of Jiaye, but to see the excitement.

As soon as he came out of the auction hall of the Jiucai Chamber of Commerce, Ye Tian tried to escape.

Then.

An extradimensional realm in the middle of the third realm made a move.

"Your Excellency, let's stay and hand over the inheritance of the wisdom body of the Ka Ye!"

The third realm that shot was not very powerful, but he dared to do it directly, which made all the third realm transcendent realms stunned.

Where did you come from, a fool!

Then.

Ye Tian deliberately struggled to make his move, and the terrifying physical power of the powerful extradimensional rules outside the world cast the superdimensional annihilation technique on his hand, and a blow pierced the attacker's body and broke into the extradimensional realm in the opponent's body.

Burst!!!!

The Third Realm immediately flew upside down, his whole body shattered, and the extradimensional realm in his body was damaged.

Immediately, the Third Realm fled in fright.

"A fool, so weak, he still dares to covet the inheritance of the wisdom body of the Ka Ye!"

They all laughed.

And they also knew that the fourth realm of the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce was definitely hidden in the dark, so they naturally didn't dare to participate.

"Extradimensional Void Escape!"

Ye Tian burned the origin of the transcendent realm in his body and all the forces to try to escape.

"Capture him, it seems impossible for him to take us to the Third Realm!"

The fourth realm of the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce shook his head and said.

After all, this guy has self-destructed potential and tried to escape, so crazy, he can only catch it first, and then see if he can interrogate useful information.

Rumble!!!!!

The fourth realm of the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce made a move, like an eagle catching a chicken, and easily grabbed Ye Tian's replica body.

"It's not good, the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf in his body is gone!!!"

The fourth realm of the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce was stunned.

They were watching Ye Tian all the time, Ye Tian didn't have any contact with other extradimensional realms at all, where was the opportunity to transfer the wisdom of the Jiaye Leaf?

"No, the third realm !!! who was hit hard just now"

They reacted instantly.

That Third Realm deliberately attacked Ye Tian, not to find death, but to divert the wisdom of the Jiaye Leaf.

The moment Ye Tian attacked, it must have been to send the Wisdom Leaf of Jiaye into the extradimensional realm of the other party's body.

It stands to reason that this kind of small trick can't hide it from them, but they didn't perceive the breath of Ka Ye Zhi Ye, so they didn't think of it.

The two Fourth Realms tried to lock the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf, but after urging the secret technique, it was useless, and they couldn't lock the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf at all.

"Great Realm Armor!"

They thought of this, and only the Great Realm Armor Technique could shield the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf, leaving them with no way to deduce.

It stands to reason that the imprint they left behind, even the third-layer Great Realm Armor Technique, can make them feel a little bit in a short distance.

However, they don't perceive it at all.

They didn't think much of it either, trying to track down the third realm who was pretending to be badly injured.

But they are destined to be found.

During this period, Ye Tian had changed multiple copy bodies, and kept fleeing and shifting directions.

Unless they can destroy this extradimensional realm in the first place, they miss this opportunity.

Ask for flowers

How fast the speed of the extra-dimensional realm is, not to mention the extra-dimensional realm of the third realm, you can escape from a super-dimensional realm in a breath.

And Ye Tian had already left many breaths, and had already escaped far away in the Death Void, and there were still multiple replica bodies as cover.

Now, even if these two Fourth Realms are chasing and killing, they don't know which direction to chase and kill, and they can't find Ye Tian at all.

The angry two Fourth Realms could only have time to vent their anger by constantly attacking in the Death Void.

......

"Finally escaped!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

His plan was very risky, if the two Fourth Realms found out that there was a problem at the first time, they would grab his other copy body, and there would be no chance to transfer the Ka Ye wisdom body at all.

But they missed the opportunity.

"The wisdom leaf of the Ka Ye is in hand, even if there is only one leaf, but with the help of the wisdom leaf of the Ka Ye, there should be a chance to try it several times!"

If you fail several attempts, then you need to get another Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf.

"First use the Yutian Lotus Platform to continuously deduce and analyze the Kasaba wisdom body, and wait for the first layer of the Kasa leaf wisdom body to be completely analyzed and understood, and then try to cultivate the Kasaba wisdom body!"

Moreover, Ye Tian has forcibly cultivated the Ka Ye Wisdom Body alone over the years, although he has been failing, but countless attempts have also given him a lot of insights into the Ka Ye Zhi Body, at least he can put an end to many failure nodes.

An ordinary treasure land in the territory of 5660, Ye Tian occupied this place and practiced retreat here.

He didn't release the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf, but used the Fourth Layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique to create a temporary dojo, and used the Fourth Layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique to block the fourth realm's deduction and tracking of the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf.

After everything was ready, Ye Tian took out the Jiaye Wisdom Leaf.

His will, as well as the extradimensional rules, penetrated into the Kaba Wisdom Leaf, and it took a long time before he sensed a vague imprint.

"The mark left by the Fourth Realm seems to be difficult to erase!"

He tried to erase it, but without success.

"Forget it, that's it, anyway, those Fourth Realm Calculation and Perception Techniques can't break through my Fourth Layer Great Realm Armor Technique. "

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief when he thought about it.

After a period of time, Ye Tian had thoroughly comprehended the first layer of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body, and was ready to formally cultivate the first layer of the Ka Ye Zhi Body.
